---

name: Test & Code Quality Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement related to testing, coverage, or code quality
title: "[QUALITY] "
labels: quality, tests
assignees: ""

---

## Description

Clearly describe the issue or improvement needed.

## Context

Why is this improvement necessary?
(e.g. insufficient coverage, duplicated code, code smell, Sonar warning...)

## Proposed Actions

* [ ] Add or update unit tests
* [ ] Add or update integration tests
* [ ] Reduce code duplication
* [ ] Fix Sonar warnings
* [ ] Improve code readability
* [ ] Add or complete documentation

## Acceptance Criteria

* [ ] All tests pass
* [ ] No regression introduced
* [ ] Sonar passes without new critical issues
* [ ] Coverage improved or maintained

## Technical Notes

Add any useful technical details (affected class, package, Sonar rule, etc.)
